notes: Fixed before generation. Single clause, no commas/semicolons. ~15-20 syllables.

targets.text: You have absolutely no right to speak to me that way!
I cannot believe you actually did that without telling me!
Something is seriously wrong and I am genuinely terrified right now!
I never thought you would actually leave and never look back!
This is honestly the most wonderful thing that has ever happened!
You need to get out of this building right now immediately!
I genuinely expected so much better from someone like you!
Thank goodness you are finally safe and back here with me!
We have been over this exact same problem a hundred times already!
I had absolutely no idea any of this was even happening!
